data.title: New Mexico Military Institute to Modernize Technology Operations with Ellucian Student, HCM and Finance, Streamlining Cadet Services and Administrative Processes
data.description: In an effort to enhance efficiency and streamline operations, NMMI is set to introduce a SaaS-native, AI-powered platform. This initiative will impact around 1,000 Cadets by automating various processes in key areas such as admissions, registrar, student accounts, HR, and finance. This move by NMMI aligns with the broader trend within the state towards Ellucian technologies.

data.title: Mazda Reports March Sales Results
data.description: In Irvine, California, on April 1, 2026, Mazda North American Operations announced that they sold 32,017 vehicles in March 2026. This marks a significant drop of 25.7% compared to the same month in 2025. The decrease is attributed in part to having 25 selling days in March 2026, as opposed to 27 in the previous year. Overall, the company experienced a 19.8% decline in sales from the previous year.

data.title: Meet One Trike Unveils Upgraded Tour 2.0 with 50Ah Battery and Expanded Rear Design
data.description: Recently launched in New York on April 1, 2026, the Tour 2.0 etrike by One Trike is designed for extended rides and daily practicality, offering enhanced range, versatility, and a higher load capacity. This upgraded version of the Tour electric trike provides users with increased capabilities for longer journeys and increased utility.

data.title: Designs for Health Introduces NeuroCalm Peptide™ to Support Gut-Brain Harmony and Stress Resilience
data.description: NeuroCalm, a new product launched by Designs for Health®, is formulated with clinically studied peptides and postbiotic to support emotional well-being. The announcement was made on April 1, 2026, from Palm Coast, Florida. Designs for Health® is known for providing high-quality, research-backed supplements and is the preferred brand among practitioners. NeuroCalm is designed to promote emotional well-being and is backed by clinical studies.

data.title: CUPE: Airline industry appears to be flying the plane on federal government’s unpaid work probe
data.description: In Ottawa, the union representing 20,000 flight attendants in Canada, CUPE’s Airline Division, is questioning the fairness of the federal government's investigation into unpaid work in the airline industry, now in its second phase. Wesley Lesosky, President of CUPE's Airline Division, expressed concerns that the investigation seems biased in favor of the industry. The government's handling of the probe has raised doubts about its neutrality.

data.title: Leaf & Mineral™ Arrives on Harvest Natural Foods Shelves
data.description: Leaf & Mineral™, the clean cleaning brand, continues to expand its presence in the US with its third West Coast placement in just two months. The company, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, has experienced rapid growth since its entry into the market. The brand has garnered attention for its unique approach to health and wellness. With this latest placement, Leaf & Mineral™ solidifies its position as a key player in the industry, showcasing its commitment to serving customers across the country.

data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. The report also shows that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. This marks the longest continuous jobs growth streak in US history, with 94 straight months of job gains. Additionally, the report highlights that average hourly earnings have increased by 3.1% from last year, the largest jump in nearly a decade. Overall, these numbers suggest a strong and thriving labor market in the country.
